name: ltspice-automation
description: Create, simulate, parse, and report LTspice RC and RL step-response workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Generate and verify LTspice RC/RL step-response circuits.
interface.longDescription: Local Codex tools that generate visible LTspice .asc schematics for RC low-pass and RL step-response circuits, run batch simulations, parse .log measurements, compare against first-order theory, and write Markdown simulation reports.
defaultPrompt: Create and simulate a visible RC low-pass circuit.
Create and simulate a visible RL step-response circuit.
Parse this LTspice log and summarize measurements.
